package service

import (
	"context"
	"fmt"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Positive scenario for service_imports_gin_directly:
// service package depends on github.com/gin-gonic/gin instead of transport-neutral inputs.
type NotificationService struct {
	repo NotificationRepository
}

type NotificationRepository interface {
	Save(ctx context.Context, n *Notification) error
}

type Notification struct {
	ID      string
	UserID  string
	Message string
}

func NewNotificationService(repo NotificationRepository) *NotificationService {
	return &NotificationService{repo: repo}
}

func (s *NotificationService) Send(ctx context.Context, userID, message string) (*gin.H, error) {
	notification := &Notification{
		UserID:  userID,
		Message: message,
	}

	if err := s.repo.Save(ctx, notification); err != nil {
		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to save notification: %w", err)
	}

	response := gin.H{
		"id":      notification.ID,
		"user_id": userID,
		"message": message,
	}

	return &response, nil
}
